title: Febreze Air Freshener Spray Bundle – Citrus & White Verbena, Classic, Exotic Bloom & Spring Awakening (4 x 500ml)
features: Odour elimination technology – removes unwanted smells effectively

description: Bring long-lasting freshness to every room with the Febreze Air Freshener Spray Bundle. Each scent delivers a burst of clean, uplifting fragrance while eliminating odours, not just masking them. Perfect for creating a fresh atmosphere throughout your home. Includes: 🍋 Citrus & White Verbena – Zesty, refreshing, and energising 🌿 Classic – Clean and timeless freshness 🌸 Exotic Bloom – Floral and warm fragrance 🌼 Spring Awakening – Inspired by Lenor freshness
